title: MarriageLicense
description: A New York City marriage license issued by the Office of the City Clerk's Marriage Bureau — the record produced once a MarriageLicenseApplication is approved through Project Cupid (projectcupid.cityofnewyork.us). There is NO Open Data twin and NO public API for marriage licenses; the record lives only inside the Unqork-hosted Project Cupid system. Read surface only — the write surface is marriage-license-application.json.

licenseId.description: City Clerk marriage-license number (Project Cupid record id). Server-assigned.

status.description: License lifecycle status. Set by the Marriage Bureau, not the applicant.

applicationId.description: The MarriageLicenseApplication this license was issued from.

effectiveDate.description: First date the license is valid (24-hour waiting period after issuance).

expirationDate.description: Last date the license is valid (licenses expire 60 days after issuance).

waiverGranted.description: Whether a judicial waiver of the 24-hour waiting period was granted.

newNameA.description: Optional new surname elected by applicant A on the license.

newNameB.description: Optional new surname elected by applicant B on the license.
